# Casper ZKCO Smart Contract API — AI-Discoverable Documentation Index

title: ZKCO ComplianceOracle + IdentityRegistry
description: Casper Odra smart contracts for the Zero-Knowledge Compliance Oracle
docs: ./casper/compliance_oracle/ and ./casper/identity_registry/

## ComplianceOracle

record_verdict(entity_hash: String, verdict: Boolean, expires_at: u64, nrs_threshold: u64)
  - Records a PASS/FAIL compliance verdict on-chain
  - Callable only by mint_authority
  - Emits: VerdictRecorded{entity_hash, verdict, expires_at}

revoke_verdict(entity_hash: String, reason: String)
  - Revokes an existing verdict
  - Callable only by mint_authority
  - Emits: VerdictRevoked{entity_hash, reason, revoked_at}

get_verdict(entity_hash: String) -> VerdictStatus
  - Returns current verdict status (VALID, EXPIRED, REVOKED, NOT_FOUND)
  - Read-only, no gas cost

## IdentityRegistry

register_identity(wallet: Key, entity_hash: String)
  - Registers a wallet for compliance token issuance
  - Emits: IdentityRegistered{wallet, entity_hash, registered_at}

mint_compliance_token(wallet: Key, entity_hash: String)
  - Mints compliance token for a wallet with a valid verdict
  - Emits: ComplianceTokenMinted{wallet, entity_hash, minted_at, expires_at}

get_identity(wallet: Key) -> Option<IdentityRecord>
  - Returns identity record with status and expiry
  - Read-only, no gas cost
